title: Goety: Mastery of Magic Addon
description: Goety: Mastery of Magic is an addon for Goety that introduces new mechanics, progression options, and additional interactions based on alternative design directions and personal experimentation with the mod’s magic system.
body:
Goety: Mastery of Magic is an addon for Goety focused on alternative progression paths and extensions of the magic system.

The mod introduces Masteries, one for each school of magic. Each Mastery has three levels: every level increases spell potency, while higher levels grant the effects of the corresponding crowns and robes. Masteries are unlocked through rituals that often require sacrificing powerful servants related to the chosen magic type.

The addon also expands Focus Bag mechanics, allowing wands to bind to a specific bag or pack. When multiple bags are carried, the wand always accesses the bound one. This system is compatible with Sophisticated Backpacks and is intended to support more flexible and varied spellcasting setups.A new material, Lazethyst, can be crafted from Amethyst and Lapis Lazuli. Through rituals, Lazethyst can be turned into Runed Lazethyst Blocks, autonomous spellcasting constructs powered by Soul Energy and redstone. When a Focus is placed inside, the block copies its spell and stats and casts it on nearby enemies, simulating a player cast.

Runed Lazethyst Blocks operate in multiple range modes and can be further refined into specialized variants aligned with different magic schools, causing spells to behave as if cast using the corresponding staff. Most Goety spells are supported, with configuration options available to exclude incompatible focuses.

Join my discord to tell me about bugs/problems: https://discord.gg/6gKjPcQRqZ
